backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Booking type and two endpoints: submitBooking (validates and stores a booking) and getBookings (returns all bookings in reverse order).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (visual theme, hero, services, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and hook inventory.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH design tokens for light and dark color schemes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Elite Car Care React SPA, mounting the app at the #root div and loading the Vite entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Navbar, Hero, Services, WhyChooseUs, Gallery, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact, Footer) into a single-page layout with a near-black background.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Booking form component with six fields, client-side validation, backend submission via useSubmitBooking hook, and loading/error/success UI states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column footer with brand logo, smooth-scroll navigation links, business hours, contact details, and social media icon links (Facebook, Instagram, X).
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Responsive six-image gallery grid with gold hover overlays, label badges, scroll-reveal entrance animations, and a click-to-open lightbox modal.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, dark overlay, headline, tagline, CTA buttons (Book Now / Our Services), and a stats row. Smooth-scrolls to #contact or #services on button click.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, a Book Now CTA, and a mobile slide-in drawer with a backdrop. Smooth-scrolls to section anchors on link click.
frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx: Pricing section displaying three service packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) as cards with feature lists and a Book button that scrolls to #contact. The Standard plan is visually highlighted as most popular.
frontend/src/components/ScrollReveal.tsx: Reusable wrapper component that uses IntersectionObserver to add a 'visible' CSS class when the element enters the viewport, supporting an optional animation delay.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section rendering a 3-column grid of six detailing service cards, each with a Lucide icon, name, subtitle, and description, animated via ScrollReveal.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials section displaying six client reviews in a responsive grid, each card showing a star rating, quote, and reviewer name/role, with hover border highlight and ScrollReveal animations.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: React section component displaying four key business highlights (experience, products, satisfaction, mobile service) in a two-column layout with scroll reveal animations and a gold-accented dark theme.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitBooking mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitBooking method and invalidates the bookings query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark luxury theme with gold accents using CSS custom properties (oklch colors), Tailwind layers, and reusable component classes like btn-gold and card-dark.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom oklch-based color tokens (gold, surface, sidebar), custom fonts (Montserrat, Playfair Display), box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Elite Car Care single-page website's architecture, existing features, required image assets, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0.
